created_from_research: SRDC + Granville + Ketty backtest research in ChatGPT conversation
risk_notice: Research candidates only. Not broker-connected, not auto-trading, and not financial advice.

default_goal_context.primary_use: goal-based trade readiness and forward testing

candidates.summary: Main balanced candidate. SRDC yesterday high/low breakout filtered by D1 trend, D1 Bollinger expansion, and H1 Ketty trend regime. Runner exit after profit protection.

entry_rules.long: Buy stop at yesterday high + 2 pips only when filters approve long.
entry_rules.short: Sell stop at yesterday low - 2 pips only when filters approve short.

filters.d1_trend: D1 close > EMA50 only long; D1 close < EMA50 only short.
filters.h1_ketty_trend_mod: Long: H1 price above SMA14 and BB middle, SMA14 upward, SMA20 not down. Short: inverse.
filters.market_regime: Use only in clear trend or trend-breakout regime. Range/unclear = wait.

goal_use.when_to_use: Normal growth mode when goal path is on track or moderately behind, no major drawdown, no high-impact news risk.
goal_use.when_to_block: Block during unclear H1 regime, range, high-impact news window, or after hitting defense drawdown rules.

candidates.summary: A+ strict candidate. Lower trade count, highest quality profile, best for drawdown recovery and capital protection.

entry_rules.long: Buy stop at yesterday high + 2 pips only when strict trend filters approve long.
entry_rules.short: Sell stop at yesterday low - 2 pips only when strict trend filters approve short.

filters.d1_trend: D1 close > EMA50 only long; D1 close < EMA50 only short.
filters.h1_ketty_strict: Strict trend: price, MA angle, BB middle, and trend structure must all agree.

goal_use.when_to_use: Use after drawdown, after two losses, near major equity milestones, or when protecting gains.
goal_use.when_to_block: Block if filters are not strict-clear, news risk is high, or London window is missed.

candidates.summary: Aggressive SRDC candidate using D1 EMA50 and Bollinger expansion without Ketty H1 filter. More trades and higher historical compounding, but bigger drawdown.

entry_rules.long: Buy stop at yesterday high + 2 pips when D1 filters approve long.
entry_rules.short: Sell stop at yesterday low - 2 pips when D1 filters approve short.

filters.d1_trend: D1 close > EMA50 only long; D1 close < EMA50 only short.

goal_use.when_to_use: Only when equity is near new high, no recent loss streak, and market quality is very clear.
goal_use.when_to_block: Block after drawdown, after loss streak, near target protection stage, or high news risk.

candidates.summary: Granville G2 candidate. Uses pullback/continuation idea: only take SRDC when H1 EMA20 structure supports Granville Buy2/Sell2.

entry_rules.long: Buy stop at yesterday high + 2 pips after H1 Granville Buy2 EMA20 context.
entry_rules.short: Sell stop at yesterday low - 2 pips after H1 Granville Sell2 EMA20 context.

filters.d1_trend: D1 close > EMA50 only long; D1 close < EMA50 only short.
filters.h1_granville_g2_ema20: Use Buy2/Sell2 only: trend pullback near EMA20 then continuation. Do not use countertrend Granville points.

goal_use.when_to_use: Use as secondary confirmation when market shows pullback-continuation structure.
goal_use.when_to_block: Block if price is chasing far from EMA20 or H1 pullback structure is missing.

candidates.summary: M5 strict execution confirmation. Not the main strategy brain. Use M5 to refine entry only after D1/H1/M15 approve.

entry_rules.long: M5 confirms execution after higher timeframes approve SRDC long.
entry_rules.short: M5 confirms execution after higher timeframes approve SRDC short.

filters.d1_trend: D1 close > EMA50 only long; D1 close < EMA50 only short.
filters.m5_use: Execution precision only. Avoid using M5 alone as the strategy brain.

goal_use.when_to_use: Use only to refine or confirm entry after main candidate gives READY.
goal_use.when_to_block: Block if higher timeframe setup is not ready.

candidates.summary: Very aggressive H1 Ketty trend-only version. High historical compounding but less protective than main candidate. Keep for research, not first live use.

entry_rules.long: Buy stop at yesterday high + 2 pips when H1 Ketty trend approves long.
entry_rules.short: Sell stop at yesterday low - 2 pips when H1 Ketty trend approves short.

filters.h1_ketty_trend_mod: H1 trend mod only. D1 EMA50 and D1 BB expansion are not required in this research version.

goal_use.when_to_use: Research only. Consider only when future forward test proves stability.
goal_use.when_to_block: Block in real trading until forward tested and risk rules are approved.

mode_selection_rules.a_plus_safe: Use after drawdown, after two losses, near major milestone, or when protecting gains.
mode_selection_rules.main: Use for normal goal path growth when market and account state are healthy.
mode_selection_rules.attack_research: Research-only or rare use near equity high with no drawdown and strong market quality.
mode_selection_rules.execution_confirmation: Use M5 only after higher timeframes approve.
mode_selection_rules.no_trade: Use during range, unclear regime, high-impact news window, missed London setup, or discipline violation risk.
